commands.summary: Located the historical PySide6 RSS app under C:\Projects\SCOUT-2\modules\Personas\FeedManager\Toolbox\Feed_Portal, including Feed_Portal.py, modules/rss_feed_reader.py, modules/feed_entry_frame.py, and feeds.json.

Confirmed the old feed portal used PySide6, feedparser, requests, categories, manual refresh, entry details, persisted feeds.json, and external browser opening. ForgeLink carried forward behavior, not the Python runtime.

Built backend and renderer, ran renderer tests, backend database/server/signals tests, migrations, Twilio tests, onboarding tests, and Electron syntax checks. New coverage includes RSS/Atom parsing, duplicate signal item handling, failed fetch state, export/retention separation, UI separation, and notification boundaries.
Captured Electron/dist/ui-preview.png with a seeded Signals source and item; inspected the screenshot for the bounded Signals view and no visible overlap.
Repository governance validation passed after moving 008 to completed.

environment.security_note: Feeds are fetched by the backend with http/https-only URLs, 8s timeout, 3 redirects, 1 MB response cap, content-type checks, text-only parsing, and external links opened outside the renderer.
